roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CTORD:WITNESSES EXCLUDED FROM THE COURTROOM/ /WITSWORN: DEPUTY PETRA HAHN/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 1, PHOTO OF DEPUTY HAHN'S LEFT RING FINGER, PEOPLE'S 2, PHOTO OF DEPUTY MARTIN'S HAND/ /X:BASED UPON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AT THE PRELIMINARY HEARING, THE COMPLAINT IS CONFORMED TOPROOF, THE COURT REDUCES AND CERTIFIES THE OFFENSES OF COUNTS 1 AND 2, PC 243(C)2, AS MISDEMEANORS, TO THE SUPERIOR COURT,/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 4, PC 243(C)(2), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/X:ALL COUNTS ARE CERTIFIED TO SUPERIOR COURT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/BAIL:50000/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:TO TRAIL 15014359/DOP/
